column1: WHEN p.product_category_name IS NULL OR p.product_category_name = '' THEN 'Sem_Categoria'
JOIN Product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHEN p.product_category_name IS NULL OR p.product_category_name = '' THEN 'Sem_Categoria'
JOIN Order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN Product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
-- Subquery para encontrar o máximo vendido por estado
JOIN Order_item oi2 ON o2.order_id = oi2.order_id
JOIN Order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN Seller s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id
WHEN p.product_category_name IS NULL OR p.product_category_name = '' THEN 'Sem_Categoria'
JOIN Order_item oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHEN p1.product_category_name IS NULL OR p1.product_category_name = '' THEN 'Sem_Categoria'
WHEN p2.product_category_name IS NULL OR p2.product_category_name = '' THEN 'Sem_Categoria'
JOIN Order_item oi2 ON oi1.order_id = oi2.order_id
JOIN Product p1 ON oi1.product_id = p1.product_id
